ksa_text: Profile, assess, and evaluate data quality, completeness, consistency, and fitness for purpose against quality standards.

dcwf.top_element_label: Conduct quality control in order to determine validity and relevance of information gathered about networks.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology
Conduct quality control in order to determine validity and relevance of information gathered about networks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-016 (DQ, Task) maps to Data Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4705 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: onet=0.470, ddat=0.429, dcwf=0.419. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4705 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-T-016 (DQ, composite 0.4705) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles does not surface this DQ-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4705 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DQ domain content at composite 0.4705 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4705, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
